OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "clinicianRecordId": "0017x00001G68sPAAR", "taxanomiesFromNPPES": { "primary": true, "license": "22709", "state": "NE", "taxonomy_group": "", "code": "208000000X", "desc": "Pediatrics" }, "basicInformationFromNPPES": { "name_suffix": "--", "name_prefix": "Dr.", "status": "A", "last_updated": "2007-07-08", "enumeration_date": "2006-10-12", "sex": "F", "sole_proprietor": "NO", "credential": "MD", "middle_name": "K", "last_name": "ANDERSON", "first_name": "RACHEL" }, "enteredNPINumber": "1669561106", "clinicianTaxanomies": [ { "IsPrimaryTaxonomy": false, "Name": "Pediatrics", "Id": "0bP7x0000000HVVEA2", "PractitionerId": "0037x000014oK7BAAU" }, { "IsPrimaryTaxonomy": false, "Name": "Allopathic & Osteopathic Physicians/Surgery/Hospice and Palliative Medicine", "Id": "0bP7x0000000N4fEAE", "PractitionerId": "0037x000014oK7BAAU", "TaxonomyCode": "2086H0002X" }, { "IsPrimaryTaxonomy": false, "Name": "Physician Assistants & Advanced Practice Nursing Providers/Clinical Nurse Specialist, Psychiatric/Mental Health, Adult", "Id": "0bP7x0000000NUTEA2", "PractitionerId": "0037x000014oK7BAAU", "TaxonomyCode": "364SP0809X" }, { "IsPrimaryTaxonomy": false, "Name": "Allopathic & Osteopathic Physicians/General Practice", "Id": "0bP7x0000000NXhEAM", "PractitionerId": "0037x000014oK7BAAU", "TaxonomyCode": "208D00000X" }, { "IsPrimaryTaxonomy": true, "Name": "Physician Assistants & Advanced Practice Nursing Providers/Nurse Practitioner, Pediatrics", "Id": "0bP7x0000000NZJEA2", "PractitionerId": "0037x000014oK7BAAU", "TaxonomyCode": "363LP0200X" } ], "clinicianBoardCertifications": { "Id": "0YS7x00000007O5GAI", "PractitionerId": "0037x000014oK7BAAU", "CertificationName": "Board Certification" }, "clinicianDetails": { "Name": "Rachel K Anderson", "MiddleName": "K", "LastName": "Anderson", "Id": "0017x00001G68sPAAR", "RecordTypeId": "0127x00000GaDvBAAV", "PersonContactId": "0037x000014oK7BAAU", "FirstName": "Rachel" }, "Err_RunningContext": "ClinicianValidateClinicianDataVsNPPESOutputOS:Clinician_UpdateClinicianRecordIP", "Err_CtxId": "0017x00001G68sPAAR", "Err_ProcessType": "IP", "casedFirstNameFromNPPES": "Rachel", "casedMiddleNameFromNPPES": "K", "casedLastNameFromNPPES": "Anderson", "omniScriptId": "0jN7x0000004ZqPEAU", "elementName": "UpdateClinicianRecord" }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Updates Clinician record with Board Certifications And HealthCare Taxonomies.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianUpdateClinicianRecordIP

childElements.name: DMExtractTaxonomyCode
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : false, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMExtractTaxonomyCode", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "taxanomiesFromNPPES", "element" : "taxanomiesFromNPPES" }, { "inputParam" : "clinicianRecordId", "element" : "clinicianDetails:PersonContactId" } ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "isActive" : true, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { }, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ListActionSetPrimaryTaxonomyList
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : false, "useFormulas" : false, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "ListUpdateTaxonomyHC", "matchingPath" : "TaxonomyCode", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "matchingPath" : "code", "normalizeKey" : "1", "listKey" : "taxanomiesFromNPPESList" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : false, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "ListUpdateTaxonomyHC", "taxanomiesFromNPPESList" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { "Name" : "=IF(ISBLANK(Name), desc, Name)", "primary" : "=IF(primary == true, true, false)" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "isActive" : true, "id" : "", "internalNotes" : "", "postActionLogging" : "", "preActionLogging" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "restOptions" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction4" }

childElements.name: ListUpdateTaxonomyHC
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : false, "useFormulas" : false, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "DMExtractTaxonomyCode:taxonomyCare", "matchingPath" : "TaxonomyCode", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "DMExtractTaxonomyCode:HCTaxonomyList", "matchingPath" : "TaxonomyCode", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : false, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DMExtractTaxonomyCode:taxonomyCare", "DMExtractTaxonomyCode:HCTaxonomyList" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { "TaxonomyId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TaxonomyId), Id, TaxonomyId)" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "isActive" : true, "id" : "", "internalNotes" : "", "postActionLogging" : "", "preActionLogging" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "restOptions" : { } }

childElements.name: LoadClinicianRecordWithTaxAndCertsNew
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "casedLastNameFromNPPES" : "=%casedLastNameFromNPPES%", "NPPESBasic" : "=%basicInformationFromNPPES%", "casedMiddleNameFromNPPES" : "=%casedMiddleNameFromNPPES%", "ContextId" : "=%clinicianRecordId%", "casedFirstNameFromNPPES" : "=%casedFirstNameFromNPPES%", "TaxonomiesToBeUpserted" : "=%ListActionSetPrimaryTaxonomyList%", "NPINumber" : "=%enteredNPINumber%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadClinicianRecordWithTaxAndCertsNew", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "internalNotes" : "", "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { } }
